title: MTR Foods is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MTR Foods is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!
